entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The structural arrangement and growth patterns of a plant's root system in soil

entities.name: ROOT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of analyzing and quantifying root system traits

entities.name: RHIZOBOX
entities.description: An affordable soil-based growth and imaging system designed for root phenotyping

entities.name: PHENOTIKI SENSOR INTERFACE
entities.description: A sensor interface used for acquiring, stitching, and analyzing root images

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A dicot species (Cicer arietinum) used to study root system dynamics

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: A monocot species (Hordeum vulgare) used to study root system architecture

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The growth medium that typically obscures root visibility

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A low-income country where the phenotyping system is relevant for agricultural improvement

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The productivity of crops per unit area

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of crops to withstand and recover from climate-related stresses

entities.name: PLANT RESOURCE ACQUISITION
entities.description: The process by which plants obtain essential nutrients and water from the soil

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth phase of the plant life cycle focused on leaf and stem development

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth phase of the plant life cycle focused on flowering and seed production
